items.title: France unveils aid to shield key sectors from soaring fuel prices
items.description: Facing soaring fuel prices from the Middle East conflict, the French government has announced €70 million in targeted aid for April, helping transport, fishing, and agriculture. The support is limited, sector-focused, and adaptable, while broader tax cuts are ruled out to protect public finances.
